name: Abdullah Saeed Khodari
title: Frontend Engineer
summary: Passionate and detail-oriented Frontend Engineer specializing in building highly responsive, scalable, and accessible web and mobile applications. Expert in React.js, Next.js, and React Native (Expo) with a strong foundation in modern styling frameworks like Tailwind CSS. Adept at translating complex Figma designs into pixel-perfect UIs and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver seamless user experiences.

experience.brief: Building scalable, responsive React applications, implementing complex UI/UX designs, and integrating secure payment and notification APIs.
Lead frontend developer for a cross-platform learning platform, building Next.js web portals and deploying React Native apps to mobile stores.

projects.name: Loyalla - Multi-Tenant SaaS Platform | OrderKing Egypt
bullets: Architected a scalable 4-tier multi-tenant SaaS infrastructure (Agencies > Tenants > Branches > Consumers) using Node.js, Express, and Drizzle ORM.
Engineered a resilient FinTech core integrating Stripe and Fawry, featuring automated subscription mirroring, multi-currency billing, and localized tax compliance (VAT).
Developed an automated PDF and QR generation pipeline using PDFKit for branded multi-currency invoicing and RKSV-compliant financial reporting.
Developed a distributed background task system using pg-boss to orchestrate high-volume asynchronous marketing campaigns and automated system maintenance.
Implemented an enterprise-grade security layer featuring Supabase Vault for secret management and a programmatically generated GDPR data portability engine.
Architected an interactive Developer Portal with automated API documentation and environment-aware code samples to streamline third-party POS integrations.
Developed an enterprise-grade administrative dashboard using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, maintaining a type-safe component library for high-scale multi-tenant management.
Built a global Internationalization (i18n) framework supporting LTR/RTL dashboard interfaces (EN, DE, TR, AR) with context-aware UI feedback loops.
Implemented a sophisticated geospatial layer using React-Leaflet, allowing admins to visualize branch distribution and perform precision location-picking via custom map interactions.
Engineered advanced analytics dashboards using Chart.js, featuring dynamic date-range filtering, localized number formatting (MENA/EU), and responsive time-series visualization.

projects.name: Enterprise ERP & POS Platform | OrderKing Egypt
bullets: Architected a comprehensive B2B dashboard for internal agents and external business customers using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Developed a robust frontend for the PSL inventory module, featuring interactive stock history tracking and drag-and-drop warehouse management.
Implemented a multi-channel CRM and ticketing system supporting Classic/Emergency Support, RMAs, and real-time chat with branches.
Built a complete financial accounting UI handling fiscal periods, digital quotes, automated invoicing, and visual dashboard analytics.
Integrated secure, token-authenticated digital asset viewing and interactive digital e-signature capabilities (SignaturePad) for logistics sign-offs.
Configured secure authentication flows distinguishing between admin agents and external B2B customers, implementing strictly protected routing.

projects.name: WingoLand - Game-Based Learning Platform | WingoLand
bullets: Built the main web application using Next.js and Tailwind CSS, optimizing for performance and responsive design.
Developed and published a cross-platform mobile application using React Native (Expo), successfully deploying to Google Play and the Apple App Store.

projects.name: Home Service Booking App
bullets: Developed the frontend for a home service booking mobile application using React Native (Expo) and Tailwind CSS.
Translated complex Figma designs into high-quality, pixel-perfect, and responsive UI components.
Integrated service booking flows, user profiles, and real-time status updates via RESTful APIs.

projects.name: Trego eCommerce Platform
bullets: Engineered a modern, fully-featured eCommerce web application built with Next.js, TypeScript, shadcn, and lucide.
Developed a bilingual interface (Arabic and English) ensuring full RTL/LTR responsiveness across all devices.
Created an intuitive frontend architecture for product listings, multilingual search, smart shopping carts, and a comprehensive admin dashboard.

projects.name: QR Generator Authentication Mobile App
bullets: Developed a cross-platform mobile app using React Native and Expo for secure QR code generation and management.
Implemented strict client-side input validation using the Zod schema validation library.
Integrated real-time Socket.io connections for dynamic UI updates upon authentication state changes.

projects.name: Game-Based Learning Mobile App
bullets: Designed and built the user interface for a children's game-based learning app using React Native (Expo).
Created dynamic game views and an interactive level map populated by data fetched from backend APIs.

projects.name: RentEase Web Interface
bullets: Built a responsive React interface for property listing and booking, optimized for seamless user navigation.
Integrated automated WhatsApp messaging triggers directly from the frontend UI.

education.details: Intensive hands-on training focusing on building full-stack applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Angular, and Node.js.

education.degree: Bachelor's in Computer and Systems Engineering
education.details: Grade: Very good. Graduation project: Game-based learning mobile app (Grade: Excellent).
